latest_commit.message: Save progress on CUDA FA2 integration

recent_commits.message: Save progress on CUDA FA2 integration
Fix flash-attn correctness test for pytest collection
Scaffold handwritten CUDA FA2 via torch cpp_extension
Add batch-view prefill adapter path and validation tests

completed_milestones: Prefill batch-view adapter and backend dispatch for cuda_fa2 are in place.
Torch cpp extension scaffold and FA2 extension loading path are integrated.
CUTLASS/CUTE-compatible FA2 source set added under nanovllm/csrc/fa2.
flash-attn correctness script converted to pytest-collected tests.
open_items: Handwritten CUDA FA2 kernel needs further hardening before default enablement.
Torch-ext launch shape support remains conservative.
Need broader perf/stability coverage before backend default switch.
next_actions: Expand shape and head-dim correctness coverage.
Add long-sequence and multi-batch regression stress tests.
Define repo policy for deps/ and third_party/ tracking.
